---
title: enforce-repeated-arg-type-style
description: "Enforce repeated argument type style."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Enforce repeated argument type style. Strider default: any style.

## Bad

```go
func add(left int, right int) int // with short style configured
```

## Good

```go
func add(left, right int) int // with short style configured
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only enforce-repeated-arg-type-style`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
